scenes.description: Woman in her early 60s, natural grey highlights, standing on a clean autumn patio surrounded by fallen leaves. She holds the Seese Pro effortlessly in one hand at her side, arm relaxed — not flexed. Her other hand rests casually on a railing. She's looking slightly off-camera with a quiet, satisfied smile. Warm late-afternoon backlight. Fallen maple leaves on the deck boards. She's wearing casual homeowner clothes — nothing sporty or performative.
scenes.mood: Warm, authentic, quietly proud — the feeling of 'I did this myself and it was easy'

scenes.description: The Seese Pro blower held upright in one hand on the left side of the frame, next to a standard 1kg bag of sugar held in the other hand on the right — side-by-side weight comparison. Shot from the front at chest height. Clean garage workbench in the background, slightly blurred. Warm natural light from a side window. The visual punchline: they weigh the same. No text overlay needed — the composition speaks for itself.

Flat lay on a warm light-oak wood surface. The Seese Pro blower is centered and slightly elevated on a subtle riser. Arranged around it from left to right: extra 21V lithium battery pack, two nozzle attachments (precision cone and wide spread), compact storage case (open to show interior), and rapid charger. All items have breathing room — not cluttered. Soft diffused overhead light with gentle warm shadows. No price tags in this shot. Premium, unboxing-editorial feel.
scenes.mood: Premium, organized, complete — the feeling of opening a thoughtful gift

scenes.description: Four-panel lifestyle grid arranged 2x2. Panel 1 (top-left): Senior woman, 60s, blowing autumn leaves off a wooden deck — warm golden hour light, leaves mid-air, relaxed posture. Panel 2 (top-right): Man in his late 60s drying his car in a driveway using the Seese Pro — contactless, no cloth, small smile of satisfaction. Panel 3 (bottom-left): Close-up of the Seese Pro nozzle clearing frost from a car windshield on a cold morning — breath visible in the air, soft blue-grey winter light. Panel 4 (bottom-right): Person clearing dust and sawdust from a garage workshop surface — warm interior light, wooden workbench, competent and calm. All four: real, everyday, non-stock-photo energy.
scenes.mood: Real life, capable, seasonal — four small proofs that this fits into actual daily homeowner life

scenes.description: Single testimonial visual: candid-style portrait of a man in his late 60s, sitting on his front porch steps with the Seese Pro resting across his knee. He's looking directly at camera with a relaxed, genuine expression — not posed, not grinning. Warm late-morning light. A quote overlaid in clean sans-serif: 'I used to dread Saturdays. Now I'm done before coffee gets cold.' — Gary T., 67, Vermont. His name and age in smaller text below.
scenes.mood: Genuine, relatable, low-key triumphant — the quiet satisfaction of a man who proved himself right

scenes.description: Clean white surface product shot. The Seese Pro blower is centered and prominent. The four bundled items (extra battery, nozzle set, storage case, charger) are fanned out symmetrically beside it. Overlaid pricing in bold: '$119.99' in high-contrast dark text, with '$249.99' visibly crossed out in lighter grey above it. A subtle green badge reads 'Today Only — 55% Off'. Lighting is bright, neutral, trustworthy — no warm filter here. This is the moment of decision; the visual must feel clear and credible.
scenes.mood: Clear, trustworthy, urgent without being aggressive — a legitimate deal presented plainly

scenes.description: Woman in her early 60s standing in a tidy garage or mudroom, gently placing the Seese Pro into its compact storage case. The case sits on a low shelf at a natural height. Her expression is calm and satisfied — the quiet look of someone finishing a job well done. The garage is organized but lived-in: a bicycle partially visible, clean tools on hooks. Warm tungsten interior light. The visual message: 'Done. Easy. Mine. No help needed.' No action, no drama — just completion.
scenes.mood: Calm, complete, quietly proud — the emotional payoff of independence regained
